title: AI music generator Suno breach affects 55M users, per Have I Been Pwned | TechCrunch
summary: A cyberattack at AI music generator Suno last year allowed a hacker to steal the personal information of more than 55.3 million people, according to the data breach notification service Have I Been Pwned , offering the first glimpse into the scale…
